info.title: SpaceOS Kernel API
info.description: SpaceOS Kernel — Clean Architecture REST API. Authenticate with JWT Bearer.

get.summary: List audit events (paged)
get.description: Returns a paged list of audit events, optionally filtered by tenant and/or date range. Requires authentication.

get.summary: Verify audit event chain integrity
get.description: Walks the audit event chain for the specified tenant and date range, verifying that every PreviousHash link is intact and that state hashes match the external sink.

post.summary: Dry-run: count audit records that would be affected by an algorithm migration
post.description: Performs a read-only dry-run analysis of re-hashing a tenant's audit event chain with a new cryptographic algorithm. Returns how many records would need to be re-hashed. No data is modified. Admin-only.

post.summary: Revoke a refresh token (logout).
post.description: Revokes the presented refresh token. Idempotent: if the token does not exist or is already revoked, 200 OK is returned (BE-P15-11).

get.summary: Get system-wide dashboard statistics
get.description: Returns aggregated counts for tenants, facilities, workstations, flow epics, and audit events. All counts are fetched in a single database round-trip. Requires ReadPolicy.

get.summary: Get a facility by ID
get.description: Returns a single facility by its unique identifier. Returns 404 if not found.

put.description: Updates the display name of an existing facility. Requires WritePolicy. Returns 404 if not found.

delete.description: Soft-deletes a facility by setting IsArchived = true. Returns 204 on success, 404 if not found, 409 if already archived.

get.summary: List work stations for a facility (paged)
get.description: Returns a paged list of work stations belonging to the specified facility. Returns 404 if the facility does not exist.

post.summary: Register a work station in a facility
post.description: Registers a new work station under the specified facility. Requires WritePolicy. Returns the new work station ID on success.

get.summary: List space layers for a facility (paged)
get.description: Returns a paged list of space layers belonging to the specified facility. Returns 404 if the facility does not exist.

post.summary: Register a space layer in a facility
post.description: Registers a new space layer under the specified facility. Requires WritePolicy. Returns the new space layer ID on success.

get.summary: List flow epics for a facility (paged)
get.description: Returns a paged list of flow epics belonging to the specified facility. Returns 404 if the facility does not exist.

post.summary: Create a flow epic in a facility
post.description: Creates a new flow epic under the specified facility. Requires WritePolicy. Returns the new flow epic ID on success.

get.summary: Get a flow epic by ID
get.description: Returns a single flow epic by its unique identifier. Returns 404 if not found.

delete.description: Soft-deletes a flow epic by setting IsArchived = true. Returns 204 on success, 404 if not found, 409 if already archived.

put.description: Replaces the title of an existing flow epic. Requires WritePolicy. Returns 404 if not found.

put.summary: Start execution of a flow epic
put.description: Transitions the flow epic into the executing state. Requires WritePolicy. Returns 404 if not found.

put.summary: Delegate a flow epic to a guest tenant
put.description: Initiates a B2B handshake by delegating the flow epic to the specified guest tenant. Requires WritePolicy. Returns 404 if not found.

put.summary: Close a flow epic with a verified proof document
put.description: Transitions the flow epic from Delivery to ClosedDone. Requires WritePolicy. Returns 404 if not found, 422 if validation fails.

post.summary: Upload a proof document for a flow epic
post.description: Stores the proof document in immutable storage and returns the URL and SHA-256 hash. Does not close the epic. Requires WritePolicy.

post.summary: Assign a stage chain template to a flow epic
Advance a flow epic to the next stage in its chain
Skip an optional stage on a flow epic
GDPR: erase user PII from the audit log
post.description: Replaces the stored JWT sub claim for the specified user with '[ERASED]', satisfying a GDPR right-to-erasure request. The pseudonym GUID is preserved so existing audit log references remain valid. Returns 204 on success, 404 when no profile exists for the given identity.

get.summary: Get the list of allowed B2B host tenants for the current tenant
get.description: Returns up to 20 host tenants that the authenticated tenant is permitted to initiate B2B handshakes with (SEC-P3CP-08). The response is derived from the TenantHandshakeAllowlist table.

get.summary: Returns all available LLM tool descriptors (OpenAI function-calling format).
Get module registry for a tenant type
get.description: Returns the required and allowed modules for the given TenantType. Case-insensitive.

post.summary: Register a remote SpaceOS node
post.description: Registers a new federation node for a tenant, issues a node JWT, and returns the manifest. Requires AdminPolicy.

put.description: Updates the LastHeartbeatAt timestamp for the node registered under the given tenant. Requires WritePolicy.

get.summary: Get the node manifest for a tenant
get.description: Returns the federation manifest for the node registered under the given tenant. Returns 404 if no manifest exists.

get.summary: Get aggregate snapshot at a point in time
get.description: Returns the most recent snapshot for the given aggregate taken at or before the specified timestamp.

get.summary: List all snapshot versions for an aggregate
get.description: Returns all snapshots recorded for the given aggregate, ordered by version ascending.

get.summary: Get a space layer by ID
get.description: Returns a single space layer by its unique identifier. Returns 404 if not found.

delete.description: Soft-deletes a space layer by setting IsArchived = true. Returns 204 on success, 404 if not found, 409 if already archived.

put.summary: Update a space layer's intent data
put.description: Replaces the local intent data JSON for an existing space layer. Requires WritePolicy. Returns 404 if not found.

post.summary: Register a new physical space
post.description: Creates a new physical space within a facility. Returns the new space identifier.

post.summary: Register a spatial element in a physical space
post.description: Inserts a new spatial element into the BVH tree of the specified physical space.

get.summary: Get spatial snapshot at a point in time
get.description: Returns a paginated snapshot of spatial elements with their FSM state at the given point in time.

get.summary: Get spatial timeline events
get.description: Returns all timeline events for a physical space in chronological order.

post.summary: Link a FlowTask to a spatial element
post.description: Creates a link between a FlowTask and a SpatialElement with a specific work phase. SEC-P3A-02: cross-tenant check enforced.

post.summary: Create a stage chain template
post.description: Creates a new tenant-configurable stage chain pipeline. Requires TenantAdmin role.

get.summary: List stage chain templates
Get a stage chain template with steps

post.summary: Add a step to a stage chain template

delete.summary: Remove a step from a stage chain template

post.summary: Create a stage handoff
post.description: Creates an immutable handoff data package for a stage transition. Requires StageOperator role.

get.summary: Get stage handoff history for a flow epic
Get the latest handoff for a (FlowEpic, source, target) triple
Get a single stage handoff by ID

post.summary: Register a stage definition
post.description: Registers a new Stage Module definition for a tenant. Requires SystemAdmin role.

get.summary: List active stage definitions
get.description: Returns all active stage definitions for the current tenant.

put.description: Replaces the module endpoint URL of an existing stage definition. Requires SystemAdmin role.

delete.description: Marks the stage definition as inactive. Requires SystemAdmin role.

post.summary: Receive an offline sync signal
post.description: Appends a state-change signal to the tenant's hash chain. Idempotent on duplicate ClientSignalId. Requires WritePolicy.

get.summary: List all tenants (paged)
get.description: Returns a paged list of all tenants. Requires the ReadPolicy role. Supports `page`, `pageSize`, and optional `tenantType` filter query parameters.

post.summary: Create a new tenant
post.description: Creates a new tenant with the given name. Requires AdminPolicy. Returns the new tenant ID on success.

get.summary: Get a tenant by ID
get.description: Returns a single tenant by its unique identifier. Returns 404 if not found.

put.description: Renames an existing tenant. Requires AdminPolicy. Returns 404 if the tenant does not exist.

delete.description: Soft-deletes a tenant by setting IsArchived = true. Returns 204 on success, 404 if not found, 409 if already archived.

get.summary: List facilities for a tenant (paged)
get.description: Returns a paged list of facilities belonging to the specified tenant. Returns 404 if the tenant does not exist.

post.summary: Create a facility under a tenant
post.description: Creates a new facility under the specified tenant. Requires WritePolicy. Returns the new facility ID on success.

put.description: Replaces the enabled module list for an existing tenant. Modules are validated against the tenant's TenantType. Requires AdminPolicy.

get.summary: List FlowEpics for the authenticated tenant (paginated).
List WorkStations for the authenticated tenant (paginated).
List Facilities for the authenticated tenant (paginated).
Get aggregate counts for the authenticated tenant.
Get a work station by ID
get.description: Returns a single work station by its unique identifier. Returns 404 if not found.

put.summary: Update a work station's display name
put.description: Renames an existing work station. Requires WritePolicy. Returns 404 if the work station does not exist.

delete.description: Soft-deletes a work station by setting IsArchived = true. Returns 204 on success, 404 if not found, 409 if already archived.

put.summary: Update a work station's operational status
put.description: Changes the operational status of an existing work station. Requires WritePolicy. Returns 404 if not found.

put.summary: Reassign a work station to a facility
put.description: Moves a work station to a different facility. Requires WritePolicy. Returns 404 if the work station or target facility does not exist.

AssignWorkStationToFacilityRequest.description: Request body for assigning a WorkStation to a different Facility.

proofUrl.description: The URL of the uploaded proof document.

proofHash.description: The lowercase hex-encoded SHA-256 hash of the proof document content.

CloseFlowEpicRequest.description: Request body for closing a FlowEpic with a verified proof document.

name.description: The display name for the new facility.

CreateFacilityRequest.description: Request body for creating a new Facility under a Tenant.

title.description: A non-empty title describing the scope of the epic.

CreateFlowEpicRequest.description: Request body for creating a new FlowEpic under a Facility.

name.description: The display name for the tenant.

tenantType.description: The ecosystem actor type. Defaults to "Manufacturer".

enabledModules.description: Optional initial set of enabled module names.

CreateTenantRequest.description: Request body for creating a new Tenant.

guestTenantId.description: The identifier of the guest tenant receiving the delegation.

DelegateFlowEpicRequest.description: Request body for delegating a FlowEpic to a guest tenant (B2B handshake).

externalUserId.description: The JWT `sub` claim of the user to erase.

tenantId.description: The tenant the user belongs to.

HeartbeatRequest.description: Request body for recording a node heartbeat.

LinkTaskToElementRequest.description: Request body for linking a FlowTask to a spatial element.

name.description: Snake_case tool name used in tool_call responses.

description.description: Human-readable description for the LLM to understand when to invoke this tool.

properties.description: Map of parameter name → schema definition.

type.description: Always `"object"` per the OpenAI function-calling spec.

LlmToolParameters.description: JSON Schema `object` wrapper for tool parameters.

description.description: Description shown to the LLM for this parameter.

LlmToolProperty.description: JSON Schema property definition for a single tool parameter.

tenantId.description: The tenant whose audit chain to analyse.

ReceiveSyncSignalRequest.description: Request body for receiving an offline sync signal.

refreshToken.description: The raw 43-character Base64Url opaque refresh token.

RefreshRequest.description: Request body for refresh and logout endpoints.

RegisterNodeRequest.description: Request body for registering a remote node.

facilityId.description: The facility this space belongs to.

cellSizeMm.description: The spatial grid cell size in millimetres (default 500).

RegisterPhysicalSpaceRequest.description: Request body for registering a new physical space.

externalSourceUrl.description: URL of the external source (required when federated).

intentDataJson.description: Local intent data JSON (used when not federated).

RegisterSpaceLayerRequest.description: Request body for registering a new SpaceLayer under a Facility.

flowEpicId.description: The FlowEpic this element belongs to.

RegisterSpatialElementRequest.description: Request body for registering a spatial element within a physical space.

name.description: The display name for the workstation.

RegisterWorkStationRequest.description: Request body for registering a new WorkStation under a Facility.

RenameFacilityRequest.description: Request body for renaming an existing Facility.

title.description: The new title for the epic.

UpdateFlowEpicTitleRequest.description: Request body for updating a FlowEpic's title.

intentDataJson.description: The new intent data JSON string.

UpdateSpaceLayerIntentRequest.description: Request body for updating a SpaceLayer's local intent data.

modules.description: The new set of enabled module names (e.g. ["door", "cutting"]).

UpdateTenantModulesRequest.description: Request body for updating a Tenant's enabled modules.

UpdateTenantNameRequest.description: Request body for updating a Tenant's display name.

UpdateWorkStationNameRequest.description: Request body for updating a WorkStation's display name.

UpdateWorkStationStatusRequest.description: Request body for updating a WorkStation's operational status.

Bearer.description: Enter your JWT token (without 'Bearer ' prefix). Example: eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9...
